definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">entity_attacked</field><next><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="logic_entity_compare"><field name="entity">CUSTOM:FireFly</field><value name="compareTo"><block type="source_entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="entity_set_fire"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="seconds"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">5</field></block></value><next><block type="entity_despawn"><value name="entity"><block type="source_entity_from_deps"></block></value><next><block type="spawn_particle_multi"><field name="particle">FLAME</field><value name="count"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">5</field></block></value><value name="x"><block type="coord_x"></block></value><value name="y"><block type="coord_y"></block></value><value name="z"><block type="coord_z"></block></value><value name="dx"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">3</field></block></value><value name="dy"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">3</field></block></value><value name="dz"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">3</field></block></value><value name="speed"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1</field></block></value><next><block type="explode"><field name="mode">NONE</field><value name="x"><block type="coord_x"></block></value><value name="y"><block type="coord_y"></block></value><value name="z"><block type="coord_z"></block></value><value name="power"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block><block type="entity_from_deps" x="658" y="93"></block></xml>
